title: After taking off from Salvador-BA, the crew of VASP 251 spotted a round white UFO [1988]

text_preview:
Interrelated with previous case.

Flight VSP 251 – October 3, 1988. Time: 20:45. Duration: 10 minutes. The crew of flight VASP 251 spotted a “luminous object on the horizon” in the northwest position, when the aircraft was approaching the city of Brasília, Distrito Federal, from Salvador Airport, State of Bahia. According to the pilot’s report, the UFO was a “luminous circle with varying intensity”, whose size was variable, sometimes small, sometimes large. “In the largest size, [the pilot] estimated [it was] ten times the size of a full moon”, presenting itself in “white color, sometimes tran
summary: VASP flight 251 crew spotted a luminous circular UFO up to ten times the size of a full moon while approaching Brasília from Salvador on October 3, 1988.
